title: ebenus sumatrana
intro: Ebenus sumatrana, also known as Sumatran coral tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, native to Sumatra and other parts of Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ebenus sumatrana include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from skin irritations and wounds. Ebenus sumatrana is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, making it a popular choice in traditional medicine and natural remedies.
